svg.title: Regression Plot -- OLS with 95% CI
svg.desc: Scatter chart titled "Regression Plot -- OLS with 95% CI". Series "Observations": 100 data points. Ranges from -5.76 (at -2.386903483163604) to 5.79 (at 2.290374504340268). Series "y = 2.5x + 0.053 (r=0.95)": 200 data points. Ranges from -6.72 (at -2.736287148404408) to 5.72 (at 2.290374504340268). Series "95% CI": 200 data points. Ranges from -7.12 (at 0) to 6 (at ?).
